youtube.com.injected_css: html, body { overflow-x: hidden !important; width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; } #columns.ytd-watch-flexy { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; display: block !important; } #primary.ytd-watch-flexy { max-width: 100% !important; min-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; } #primary-inner.ytd-watch-flexy { padding-left: 24px !important; padding-right: 24px !important; box-sizing: border-box !important; } #player-container-outer.ytd-watch-flexy, #player-container-inner.ytd-watch-flexy { max-width: 100% !important; margin: 0 !important; } #movie_player { left: 0 !important; } #page-manager { margin-top: 56px !important; }
